docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUYNH, PAT AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, JONI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, JONI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH, PAT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, JONI $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1000; AND ATTRIBUTES COMPARATIVE FAULT, AS FOLLOWS: 40% TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, 20% TO PLAINTIFF HUYNH; AND 40%, THE INDIVIDUAL VEHICLE WHICH TURNED OR STOPPED IN FRONT OF PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, JONI
